notes: RE-ASSESS after Control fix (5e22e47c). backchannel-observe for mistral-vibe. Vibe renders a TUI-only tool-permission dialog (approval_app Textual widget, an in-memory asyncio.Future never written to messages.jsonl) — exactly the transcript-invisible waiting state read-back (issue #732) targets. The read-back path is reader.CaptureScreen -> DetectUI -> TerminalObserver -> SessionDetector, gated on control consent at terminal_observer.go:111. HALF-FIXED: commit 5e22e47c declares Control{SupportsInput}+ControlPermission on vibe/agent.go, so the consent gate now opens for vibe (blocker #1 resolved). STILL BROKEN: DetectUI's trustDialogMarkers (uidetect.go) are Claude-Code-only and don't cover vibe's 'Permission for the … tool' phrasing, so DetectUI returns UIKindNone and the working->waiting edge never fires. daemon=bug — one feasible blocker left (add vibe markers), a documented follow-up per the Control-fix commit message. Control alone satisfies the sibling 6.1 backchannel-control (inject + observe the injected turn), NOT this scenario's read-back waiting edge. KNOWN-FAILING: the spec below asserts the CORRECT waiting arc; the recording is expected to show the session stay working (write-gap) while the dialog is held, never waiting. Single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<...> transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath), birth anchored to start unpinned. Observations: model=mistral-medium-3.5 (live config.active_model), tokens observable (sidecar context_tokens), cost NOT (vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity).

text: session_<...> session born in ready when the transcript directory appears (single-birth; id from the transcript directory)
vibe PID bound to the session (matched by cwd)

CORRECT/known-failing: while the TUI-only 'Permission for the <tool> tool' approval dialog is on screen, terminal read-back surfaces it as waiting — independent of any agent hook. The consent gate now opens (vibe declares ControlPermission, commit 5e22e47c), but DetectUI still lacks vibe's markers (uidetect.go Claude-Code-only), so no waiting edge fires.
CORRECT/known-failing: user answers the dialog and the agent resumes → leaves waiting, back to working, reclassifying from the transcript as usual
Turn completes after approval → ready; turn_done carries Tokens.Total>0
